title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six power phrases to use with Claude Code that accelerate project development without requiring better prompts, smarter models, or additional plugins. The video covers specific prompting techniques endorsed by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, including a cautionary phrase that most people misuse.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six power phrases for prompting Claude Code to speed up development cycles. The phrases target project initiation, scaling, and execution, framed as gains available through wording alone rather than better models or plugins. The video notes that these prompting strategies are endorsed by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy.
